'''hayoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doby|doby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doby|doby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hayoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæyeketh|hæyeketh]] || [[word:hæyekej|hæyekej]] || [[word:hæyekesh|hæyekesh]] || [[word:hæyeke|hæyeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayoyokoth|hayoyokoth]] || [[word:hayoyokoj|hayoyokoj]] || [[word:hayoyokosh|hayoyokosh]] || [[word:hayoyoko|hayoyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayokoth|hayokoth]] || [[word:hayokoj|hayokoj]] || [[word:hayokosh|hayokosh]] || [[word:hayoko|hayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayofkoth|hayofkoth]] || [[word:hayofkoj|hayofkoj]] || [[word:hayofkosh|hayofkosh]] || [[word:hayofkof|hayofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hayokotho|hayokotho]] || [[word:hayokojo|hayokojo]] || [[word:hayokosho|hayokosho]] || [[word:hayokoko|hayokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hayokoth|hayokoth]] || [[word:hayokoj|hayokoj]] || [[word:hayokosh|hayokosh]] || [[word:hayoko|hayoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hayokothol|hayokothol]] || [[word:hayokojol|hayokojol]] || [[word:hayokoshol|hayokoshol]] || [[word:hayokokol|hayokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hayokothotho|hayokothotho]] || [[word:hayokojojo|hayokojojo]] || [[word:hayokoshosho|hayokoshosho]] || [[word:hayokoko|hayokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hayokothon|hayokothon]] || [[word:hayokojon|hayokojon]] || [[word:hayokoshon|hayokoshon]] || [[word:hayokokon|hayokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hayokothoro|hayokothoro]] || [[word:hayokojoro|hayokojoro]] || [[word:hayokoshoro|hayokoshoro]] || [[word:hayokokoro|hayokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
